subject: Makuhita, a round yellow fighting Pokemon with stubby raised arms in a fighting stance against a sunny rocky canyon backdrop
description: A short, round, yellow creature stands with both stubby arms raised in a classic fighting or sumo-wrestling pose. Its body is compact and wide, with a large round head featuring simple facial features and a determined expression. The background shows a warm, sunlit rocky canyon with blue sky visible overhead. Bright daylight illumination gives the scene an energetic, open-air quality. The creature faces directly forward, filling the lower portion of the frame.
foreground: round yellow fighting creature with arms raised in fighting pose
background: sunny rocky canyon walls with blue sky
